mapper.insert: insert into platform_coupon_template (market_id, template_name, coupon_type, discount_amount, threshold_amount, scope_type, scope_ref_ids, use_channel, biz_purpose, claim_strategy, validity_type, validity_days, start_date, stop_date, status, issue_count, use_count, created_by_market_user_id, updated_by_market_user_id) values (#{marketId}, #{templateName}, #{couponType}, #{discountAmount}, #{thresholdAmount}, #{scopeType}, #{scopeRefIds}, #{useChannel}, #{bizPurpose}, #{claimStrategy}, #{validityType}, #{validityDays}, #{startDate}, #{stopDate}, #{status}, #{issueCount}, #{useCount}, #{createdByMarketUserId}, #{updatedByMarketUserId})
